memberdef.argsstring: (self, int stream_id, 'MplexSession' session, bool is_initiator=False, StreamPriority priority=StreamPriority.NORMAL)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Read data from stream.
Args: n: Number of bytes to read, -1 for all available
Returns: Read data
Raises: MplexStreamClosed: Stream is closed MplexStreamReset: Stream was reset

Write data to stream.
Args: data: Data to write
Returns: Number of bytes written
Raises: MplexStreamClosed: Stream is closed MplexStreamReset: Stream was reset

Half-close stream (close write side).
Send CLOSE flag to indicate no more data will be sent.

Immediately reset stream.
Send RESET flag to abort stream.
Send window update (implicit in mplex via backpressure).

Mplex logical stream.
Implements: - Read/write operations - Half-close - Flow control - Reset - Priority-based scheduling
